login.title: SIGN IN
login.subtitle: Welcome back! Please login to your account

login.loginError: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
login.accountVerified: Your account has been verified successfully.
login.passwordResetSuccess: Your password has been reset successfully.

register.title: SIGN UP

register.description: By adding a car to your garage your shopping experience will be easier and you will be able to find what you are looking for faster
register.name: Full Name
register.passwordRequirements: It must be a combination of minimum 8 letters, numbers, and symbols.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Please enter your email address or mobile number, you will receive a verifying code
forgotPassword.emailSent: Check your email for the password reset link.
forgotPassword.emailError: Failed to send reset link. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password
resetPassword.resetError: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
